name: Minestrone
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, sauté garlic in oil over medium heat until fragrant.
2. Add onions and celery; cook until softened.
3. Stir in parsley, tomato paste, beef bouillon, water, cabbage, carrots, salt, and pepper.
4. Bring to a simmer, then cover and reduce heat to low.
5. Simmer for 2 hours.
6. Add kidney beans, peas, green beans, and pasta.
7. Continue cooking until all vegetables are tender (about 20 minutes).
8. Serve with grated Parmesan cheese.
